channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: Woman Charged Following Fatal Fire Attack on Partner
item.description: Gauteng police are investigating a shocking case where a 25-year-old woman allegedly poured petrol on her partner, the father of her child, and left him to burn in bed. The victim, 25-year-old Misokuh...

item.title: Updates on 24 Sussex Drive renovations and political shifts involving Marilyn Gladu
item.description: As of April 9, 2026, several notable developments are being tracked in Canada. The prime minister’s official residence, 24 Sussex Drive, remains unoccupied and in a state of serious disrepair over a d...

item.title: Court allows LSK partial view of former OCS Talam’s medical records in Ojwang murder proceedings
item.description: The High Court in Nairobi has permitted the Law Society of Kenya (LSK) limited access to the medical records of ex-Officer Commanding Station (OCS) Talam, a key figure in the ongoing Ojwang murder cas...

item.title: Poilievre addresses Conservative leadership concerns after multiple MPs switch to Liberals
item.description: Conservative Leader Pierre Poilievre addressed the media in Richmond, B.C., following the departure of a fourth MP to the Liberals in recent months. He defended his leadership, emphasizing that his ma...

item.title: Alberta separatists report increased support amid potential Carney majority
item.description: Separatist groups in Alberta are reporting a surge in public support as Prime Minister Mark Carney nears a parliamentary majority. Volunteer canvassers collecting signatures for a citizen-led referend...

item.title: Keir Starmer condemns Israel's continued bombing of Lebanon and calls for ceasefire extension
item.description: Keir Starmer has condemned Israel’s ongoing attacks on Lebanon, labelling them as unacceptable during his visit to the Middle East. In an article for The Guardian, the UK Prime Minister argued that th...

item.title: Estée Lauder sues Jo Malone over use of her name in Zara collaboration
item.description: British perfume designer Jo Malone has expressed disappointment after Estée Lauder Companies filed a High Court lawsuit against her, her brand Jo Loves, and Zara's UK division. The beauty conglomerate...

item.title: Iranian Officials Meet in Islamabad to Seek Ceasefire Amid Regional Tensions
item.description: Iran’s diplomatic team has arrived in Islamabad, Pakistan, to participate in an urgent round of ceasefire talks aimed at easing the escalating conflict involving Iran and regional actors. The discussi...

item.title: Protesters in Buffalo City Call for Shutdown of Controversial Nightclub
item.description: In Buffalo City, hundreds of protesters marched through KuGompo City on April 8, 2026, demanding the closure of the California Tavern nightclub, allegedly involved in drug-related activities. The prot...

item.title: Philippine Coast Guard Opens Pag-asa Base Amid Tensions in West Philippine Sea
item.description: The Philippines inaugurated a new Philippine Coast Guard (PCG) district command on Pag-asa (Thitu) Island in the West Philippine Sea to strengthen its presence and protect its sovereignty in disputed ...

item.title: IMF warns Iran conflict will have permanent effects on global economy, even with peace
item.description: The head of the International Monetary Fund (IMF), Kristalina Georgieva, has stated that the Iran war will leave lasting scars on the global economy, regardless of whether a peace agreement is reached...

item.title: Commission explains reasons behind extension of October 29 election violence inquiry
item.description: The commission investigating the October 29 election-related chaos has been granted more time to complete its work due to the growing complexity and sensitivity of the investigation. Led by retired Ju...

item.title: Former Orange County man pleads guilty to $270 million Medi-Cal fraud
item.description: Paul Richard Randall, 66, of Orange County, has a long history of healthcare fraud and tax evasion. Previously arrested in 2012 for orchestrating kickbacks at an Orange County hospital, Randall ran a ...

item.title: Escalating Tensions: US-Iran Conflict and the Search for Resolution
item.description: The ongoing tensions between the United States and Iran have reached a critical juncture, prompting discussions of potential military conflict and highlighting the ongoing geopolitical complexities in...

item.title: Election-related clashes in Assam leave 30 injured, seven arrested
item.description: On Thursday, Assam witnessed incidents of poll-related violence resulting in around 30 people getting injured and seven individuals being arrested. In the Patharkandi constituency of Sribhumi district...

item.title: Review: 'You, Me & Tuscany' Delivers Predictable but Pleasant Rom-Com Fun
item.description: The film 'You, Me & Tuscany' is a classic romantic comedy that thrives on familiar tropes rather than originality. Starring Halle Bailey as Anna, a somewhat selfish house-sitter, the story follows her...

item.title: OpenAI Limits Release of New Models Due to Cybersecurity Concerns
item.description: OpenAI is reportedly preparing a new cybersecurity-focused product to be tested by a small group of partners. This decision comes as concerns mount about the potential risks associated with releasing ...

item.title: Kenya’s Struggle to Bridge the Gap Between Policy and Governance
item.description: Despite years of policies, legal frameworks, and public sector leadership training, Kenya still faces serious challenges in governance. The disconnect between policy design and implementation continue...

item.title: Pierre Poilievre Criticizes MPs Crossing the Floor and Questions Liberal Tactics
item.description: Conservative Leader Pierre Poilievre voiced harsh criticism during a press conference in Richmond, B.C., over recent defections of Conservative MPs to the Liberal Party, including Sarnia MP Marilyn Gl...

item.title: Businessman Offers Support to Man Who Lost Family in Tragic Crash
item.description: Businessman Wicknell Chivayo has come forward with a generous gift for a man who tragically lost his wife and five children in a horrific car accident. The widower, Ronald Mujuru, was devastated when ...
